suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the mandatory tests-first step for baseline-stabilization, build-ordering, and script-entrypoint fixes so workers may begin with command-level reproduction or a tiny testability refactor when the current validator is already failing or the script cannot be meaningfully tested before that refactor.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Across `stabilize-gemini-and-manual-unblock-baseline-tests`, `stabilize-plugin-sdk-typecheck-ordering`, and `fix-plugin-sdk-typecheck-freshness-check`, workers recorded justified deviations because the current backend-worker procedure requires writing tests first even when the assignment is to restore an already failing validator or make a small script entrypoint importable before adding focused regression coverage.
